generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are increasingly relying on us for defense? While some argue for reduced commitment, experts warn that cutting back could leave critical regions vulnerable. A recent study shows that 78% of security analysts believe maintaining strong alliances is key to deterring threats. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
